title: `skopeo copy docker-archive:` does not recognize media type.
body:
good day all,
i am new to skopeo so please ask if more info is needed. on my team we have a gitlab pipeline set up that uses skopeo to copy in and produce tar balls using the `docker-archive` transport and we are getting an unknown media type error.

locally the command i am using is `skopeo copy docker://gcr.io/trillian-opensource-ci/db_server:v1.6.0 docker-archive:./db_server_v1.6.0.tar` 
and the error i am getting is ` FATA[0007] creating an updated image manifest: Unknown media type during manifest conversion: "application/vnd.docker.image.rootfs.diff.tar.gzip"`
you can look here towards the bottom of where i believe this is coming from https://console.cloud.google.com/gcr/images/trillian-opensource-ci/global/db_server@sha256:ec1886abed03a4e739e69d0b9bb0fb7bf6e77c083e8f4f11cdd97dcc6f82bbfe/details?tab=pull

the actual skopeo command we use in the pipeline is a little different but the extra flags are unique to our environment but the error is the same. 

locally if i switch the transport to `oci-archive` it works fine but i am not sure if this is just something we can change in our code (as i am not on our pipelines team)

do yall think this is an actual bug or is there a workaround we are missing? 

skopeo version we are using is 1.13.3

comments.body:
ok, i lied. found the answer here https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/3668#issuecomment-990952847

sorry to bother you.
